task: Implement tasks D2-06..D2-11 from docs/task-breakdown.md: Apache POI dependency, ExcelImportService (xlsx rows -> Post via reflection, ImportBatch summary), POST /import-posts (MultipartFile), ExcelExportService (reflection-based row writer), GET /export-report (posts + latest metrics streamed as xlsx), unit tests for ExcelImportService
acceptanceCriteria: poi-ooxml dependency present in pom.xml and project compiles
ExcelImportService reads .xlsx, maps rows to Post entities, persists them, returns ImportBatch with total/success/failed counts and DONE/FAILED status
POST /import-posts accepts a MultipartFile and returns the ImportBatch summary as JSON
ExcelExportService writes entity rows to xlsx via reflection over annotated/declared fields
GET /export-report streams an .xlsx download containing posts joined with their latest social metrics
ExcelImportServiceTest covers: valid file, missing columns, empty file — all passing
Existing test suite still passes; invalid uploads return 4xx not 500
blastRadius: Future D5 JMS ImportEventProducer hooks into import completion
Future D6 @ExcelColumn annotation refactor of ExcelExportService
contracts: Post.user and ImportBatch.user are NOT NULL FKs — import must resolve a real User
Partial unique index (platform, platform_post_id) WHERE status='ACTIVE' — duplicate active keys raise DataIntegrityViolationException
DTOs are records with static from(Entity) factories
